title: valkey server vars
description: valkey vars that can be set

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

VALKEY_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for VALKEY to listen on

VALKEY_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for VALKEY to listen on

VALKEY_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for VALKEY to listen on

VALKEY_SERVICE_RUN_AS_USER.description: Windows local user account to run the service (leave empty for Network Service)

VALKEY_SERVICE_RUN_AS_PASSWORD.description: Password for the local user account (if applicable)

VALKEY_SERVICE_NAME.description: Custom name for the Windows Service (allows side-by-side installations)
